title: Veeam Backup & Replication 13 — continued GA rollout
summary: Veeam Backup & Replication 13 continues its general-availability rollout with quality-of-life updates landing through the spring. Key recent additions include enhanced object-storage immutability options and improved performance for large-scale restore operations.
why_it_matters: Each VBR point release ships under your existing license — Technijian schedules upgrades during low-impact windows so the backup environment stays current without disrupting production.

title: Veeam continues to lead the data-protection market
summary: Veeam remains the #1 data protection and ransomware recovery vendor by market share according to industry analyst tracking, reflecting both customer adoption and continued investment in the platform Technijian has standardized on.
why_it_matters: Choosing a market-leading platform means longer support tails, deeper community knowledge, and faster fixes when bugs surface.
